summary: Tested Delivery Partners management feature and Settings page with 3 tabs. All features working correctly - navigation visible, APIs functional, UI components working.

delivery_partners.navigation_visible: PASS - Delivery Partners link visible in Tenant Admin sidebar
delivery_partners.page_loads: PASS - Page loads without errors with title 'Delivery Partners'
delivery_partners.partner_appears_in_list: PASS - Created partner appears in list with all details
delivery_partners.statistics_cards: PASS - Total Partners, Active, Busy, Inactive cards display correctly
delivery_partners.add_partner_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with all fields (name, email, phone, vehicle type, vehicle number)
delivery_partners.create_via_ui: PASS - Partner created via UI form successfully

settings_page.page_loads: PASS - Settings page loads without errors
settings_page.business_tab: PASS - Business Settings tab shows delivery charge, tax, markup settings
settings_page.legal_tab: PASS - Legal & Policies tab shows Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions
settings_page.support_tab: PASS - Help & Support tab shows support email, phone, website, hours
settings_page.api_get_settings: PASS - GET /api/tenant-admin/settings returns settings with defaults
settings_page.save_button: PASS - Save button works and shows success toast

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React useEffect dependency warnings in DeliveryPartners.js and Settings.js - not blocking but should be fixed for best practices
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test delivery partners with TEST_ prefix: TEST_John Driver (test_driver@example.com), TEST_Jane Rider (test_jane@example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delivery Partners feature fully working. Settings page has 3 tabs (Business, Legal & Policies, Help & Support) all functional. Test delivery partners created with TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup.
